title: Define a validated register command
scenario: The application layer should receive a command type, not raw optional DTO fields. Keep command fields private and expose read-only accessors.
instructions: Keep RegisterUserDto active. Add RegisterUserCommand with private email and display_name fields, a constructor, and borrowed accessors.

hints.body: Add the command below RegisterUserDto so the raw boundary shape and validated application shape stay separate.
Store owned Strings privately in RegisterUserCommand, then return &str from email() and display_name().
One complete solution for Define a validated register command is shown below.

completionExplanation: The DTO remains the raw boundary shape, while RegisterUserCommand gives the application layer owned, private fields with read-only access.
